channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Super Adventure Festival Returns to Guild Wars 2, With New Loot, Homestead Music, and More for 2026
item.content:encoded:
It’s time for retro adventuring out of Rata Sum. Super Adventure Festival is back in Guild Wars 2, with some new additions for 2026.

Moto’s virtual world of retro adventuring is back, with the Super Adventure Box near Magustan Court Waypoint in Rata Sum. Portals are in every major city to help you get there. 

There are two worlds and two test zones to explore in this year's event, along with two test zones. Test zone 2 is available if you’ve completed the first one, and ANet has expanded the World 3 test zone this year.

And then, of course, there’s loot. New this year are the Powered Vest, Plush Ess Backpack, Forged-Light Weapon Set, Mini Super Red Ooze, and Retro-Forged focus, greatsword, and longbox. The Powered Vest is the reward for completing the festival’s meta-achievement, Super Adventure Box Nostalgia. There's additional loot available through achievements.

There are also new guild decoration items, and you can even unlock Super Adventure Box music for your homestead. Completing a zone for the first time has a chance to drop a soundtrack single. You can also get those records from vendors or via trade.  Perfect if you want a little Super Adventure Festival anytime of the year. 

The event is on now through May 5th at noon PT.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/super-adventure-festival-returns-to-guild-wars-2-with-new-loot-homestead-music-and-more-for-2026-2000137807
